metadata.name: ContextTypes Ontology
metadata.description: Extensible taxonomy of organisational context dimensions covering market classification, size metrics, functional and technology maturity, culture, geography, market positioning, competitor bridging, and localization — enabling multi-dimensional context assignment to organisations via ORG-CONTEXT
metadata.purpose: Provide a structured, extensible taxonomy of context types assignable to organisations via ORG-CONTEXT, spanning market, size, maturity (functional, technology, IT, AI), culture, geography, positioning, competitor, and localization dimensions with user-defined extension support
metadata.creator: OAA Generator v6.1.0

entities.name: ContextType
entities.description: Abstract base type representing any classifiable dimension of organisational context — all concrete context types extend this base, and custom extensions are supported via the ContextExtension mechanism

properties.name: contextTypeId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this context type

properties.name: name
properties.description: Display name of the context type

properties.name: description
properties.description: Detailed description of what this context type classifies

properties.name: category
properties.description: Context category: Market, Size, Maturity, Technology, Culture, Geography, Positioning, Competitor, RCSG, Localization, Custom

properties.name: isExtensible
properties.description: Whether this context type supports user-defined sub-type extension via ContextExtension

entities.name: MarketClassification
entities.description: Classifies an organisation by market and industry vertical using standard classification schemes, with hierarchical sub-sector support for granular segmentation across technology, healthcare, financial services, manufacturing, and other verticals

properties.name: marketCode
properties.description: Standard classification code from the selected scheme (e.g., SIC 7372, NAICS 511210, GICS 45103010)

properties.name: marketName
properties.description: Human-readable name of the market or industry vertical

properties.name: classificationScheme
properties.description: Classification standard: SIC, NAICS, GICS, ICB, ISIC, NACE, Custom

properties.name: parentMarket
properties.description: Parent market for hierarchical classification (e.g., Technology > Software > SaaS)

properties.name: subSectorDepth
properties.description: Depth level in the classification hierarchy (0 = sector, 1 = sub-sector, 2 = segment)

entities.name: MarketSegment
entities.description: Defines a target market segment or sub-sector within a market classification, including geographic, demographic, behavioural, and firmographic segmentation criteria with addressable market sizing

properties.name: segmentId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this market segment

properties.name: segmentName
properties.description: Name of the market segment, sub-sector, or niche

properties.name: segmentationType
properties.description: Segmentation basis: geographic, demographic, behavioural, firmographic, psychographic, technographic

properties.name: segmentLevel
properties.description: Granularity level: sector, sub-sector, segment, niche, micro-niche

properties.name: marketSize
properties.description: Estimated total addressable market size (TAM) for this segment

properties.name: growthRate
properties.description: Annual growth rate percentage for this market segment

entities.name: OrganisationSize
entities.description: Multi-dimensional size classification using headcount, customer count, revenue, and extensible KPI-linked metrics — enabling size context independent of maturity for organisations of any scale

properties.name: sizeCategory
properties.description: Size band: Micro (<10), Small (10-49), Medium (50-249), Large (250-999), Enterprise (1000+), Global (10000+)

properties.name: headcount
properties.description: Approximate number of employees (FTE equivalent)

properties.name: customerCount
properties.description: Number of active customers or clients served

properties.name: annualRevenue
properties.description: Annual revenue range bracket (e.g., <1M, 1M-10M, 10M-50M, 50M-250M, 250M-1B, 1B+)

properties.name: revenueMetric
properties.description: Revenue metric type: ARR, MRR, GMV, Turnover, Billings — aligns with KPI-ONT revenue KPIs

properties.name: customSizeMetrics
properties.description: Extensible JSON-encoded additional size metrics (e.g., locations, products, transactions) linked to KPI definitions

properties.name: yearsOperating
properties.description: Number of years the organisation has been in operation

entities.name: FunctionalMaturity
entities.description: Per-function maturity assessment enabling independent scoring of business functions including marketing, sales, operations, HR, finance, legal, procurement, and customer success — each function is assessed on a 1-5 scale

properties.name: functionName
properties.description: Business function assessed: Marketing, Sales, Operations, HR, Finance, Legal, Regulatory, Compliance, Governance, Procurement, CustomerSuccess, ProductManagement, Engineering, DataManagement, Security, Custom

properties.name: maturityLevel
properties.description: Maturity score 1-5: 1=Initial, 2=Developing, 3=Defined, 4=Managed, 5=Optimising

properties.name: maturityDescription
properties.description: Narrative assessment of the function's current maturity state and key gaps

properties.name: processFormality
properties.description: Process sophistication: Ad-Hoc, Informal, Documented, Standardised, Continuously-Improved

properties.name: teamStructure
properties.description: Team structure: None, Individual, Small-Team, Department, Cross-Functional, Centre-of-Excellence

properties.name: toolingLevel
properties.description: Tool adoption: Manual, Spreadsheets, Point-Solutions, Integrated-Platform, AI-Augmented

entities.name: TechnologyMaturity
entities.description: General technology maturity assessment covering cloud adoption, digital transformation progress, automation level, and systems integration — serves as parent for IT-specific and AI-specific sub-maturity assessments

properties.name: techMaturityLevel
properties.description: Technology maturity tier: Initial, Developing, Defined, Managed, Optimising

properties.name: cloudAdoptionStage
properties.description: Cloud maturity: None, IaaS, PaaS, SaaS-First, Cloud-Native, Multi-Cloud, Hybrid

properties.name: digitalTransformationIndex
properties.description: Score from 0-100 measuring overall digital transformation progress

properties.name: automationLevel
properties.description: Degree of process automation: Manual, Partial, Significant, Extensive, Fully-Automated

properties.name: integrationPattern
properties.description: Systems integration approach: Point-to-Point, ESB, API-First, Event-Driven, Mesh

entities.name: ITMaturity
entities.description: IT infrastructure sub-maturity focusing on DevOps practices, security posture, governance frameworks, and operational reliability — a specialisation of TechnologyMaturity for infrastructure and operations teams

properties.name: itMaturityLevel
properties.description: IT-specific maturity: Reactive, Proactive, Service-Oriented, Business-Aligned, Innovative

properties.name: devOpsPractice
properties.description: DevOps maturity: None, CI, CI-CD, GitOps, Platform-Engineering

properties.name: securityPosture
properties.description: Security maturity: Ad-Hoc, Repeatable, Defined, Managed, Adaptive

properties.name: itGovernanceFramework
properties.description: Primary governance framework: ITIL, COBIT, ISO27001, NIST, Custom

entities.name: AIReadiness
entities.description: AI-specific sub-maturity assessing data infrastructure readiness, AI talent pipeline, model deployment stage, ethics governance, and strategic AI integration — a specialisation of TechnologyMaturity for AI and ML teams

properties.name: aiReadinessLevel
properties.description: AI readiness tier: Aware, Exploring, Experimenting, Operationalising, Transforming

properties.name: dataReadiness
properties.description: Data maturity for AI: Siloed, Consolidated, Governed, AI-Ready, Data-Driven

properties.name: aiTalentScore
properties.description: Score from 0-100 measuring AI skill availability and talent pipeline

properties.name: modelDeploymentStage
properties.description: AI deployment maturity: None, PoC, Pilot, Production-Single, Production-Multiple, Enterprise-Wide

properties.name: aiEthicsGovernance
properties.description: Whether formal AI ethics and governance framework is established

entities.name: CultureContext
entities.description: Organisational culture dimensions capturing innovation orientation, risk tolerance, collaboration style, learning culture, and decision-making patterns that shape how context types are adopted and acted upon

properties.name: innovationOrientation
properties.description: Innovation stance: Conservative, Cautious, Balanced, Progressive, Disruptive

properties.name: riskTolerance
properties.description: Risk appetite: Risk-Averse, Low, Moderate, High, Risk-Seeking

properties.name: collaborationStyle
properties.description: Working style: Siloed, Team-Based, Cross-Functional, Open-Innovation, Ecosystem

properties.name: learningCulture
properties.description: Learning orientation: Compliance-Only, Training-Led, Development-Focused, Learning-Organisation, Knowledge-Creating

properties.name: decisionMaking
properties.description: Decision-making pattern: Top-Down, Consultative, Consensus, Delegated, Data-Driven

properties.name: changeReadiness
properties.description: Readiness for change: Resistant, Reluctant, Accepting, Embracing, Change-Driven

entities.name: GeoContext
entities.description: Geographic context capturing headquarters location, operating regions, market reach zones, timezone coverage, and regulatory jurisdictions that constrain or enable organisational strategy and market access

properties.name: headquartersLocation
properties.description: Primary headquarters city and country (e.g., London, UK)

properties.name: operatingRegions
properties.description: Regions with physical or legal presence: UK, EU, NA, APAC, MEA, LATAM, Global

properties.name: marketReach
properties.description: Geographic market reach: Local, Regional, National, Multi-National, Continental, Global

properties.name: timezoneCoverage
properties.description: Timezone bands covered for operations and support (e.g., GMT, GMT+EST, 24x7)

properties.name: regulatoryJurisdictions
properties.description: Key regulatory jurisdictions affecting operations: UK-FCA, EU-GDPR, US-SEC, AU-APRA, etc.

properties.name: languagesSupported
properties.description: Languages supported for products, services, and operations

entities.name: MarketPositioning
entities.description: Competitive market positioning capturing market share, brand strength, differentiation strategy, pricing position, and value proposition alignment — extensible with custom positioning criteria for specific markets

properties.name: positioningStrategy
properties.description: Core positioning: Cost-Leader, Differentiator, Niche-Focus, Best-Value, Disruptor, Premium

properties.name: marketShareEstimate
properties.description: Estimated market share: Dominant (>40%), Leader (20-40%), Challenger (10-20%), Follower (5-10%), Niche (<5%)

properties.name: brandStrength
properties.description: Brand recognition: Unknown, Emerging, Established, Strong, Dominant

properties.name: pricePosition
properties.description: Price positioning: Economy, Value, Mid-Market, Premium, Luxury

properties.name: differentiators
properties.description: Key competitive differentiators as comma-separated list (e.g., technology, service, price, innovation)

properties.name: customPositioningCriteria
properties.description: Extensible JSON-encoded custom positioning criteria specific to the market (e.g., ESG score, NPS, analyst ranking)

entities.name: CompetitorContext
entities.description: Bridge entity connecting organisational context to competitor analysis, enabling context-aware competitor tracking with threat assessment, recommended responses, and strategic watch-list management

properties.name: competitorRef
properties.description: Reference to competitor entity in ORG-CONTEXT Competitor or CA-ONT (cross-ontology bridge)

properties.name: threatLevel
properties.description: Current threat level: Low, Moderate, High, Critical, Watch

properties.name: competitiveOverlap
properties.description: Degree of market overlap: Minimal, Partial, Significant, Direct, Head-to-Head

properties.name: recommendedResponse
properties.description: Strategic recommendation: Monitor, Differentiate, Compete, Partner, Acquire, Avoid

properties.name: contextRelevance
properties.description: Which context dimensions this competitor is relevant to (e.g., Market, Technology, Geography)

entities.name: LocalizationContext
entities.description: Localization variables extending geographic context with currency, tax, data residency, content, date/number formatting, and accessibility requirements — each operating region may have distinct localization needs that affect product, compliance, and market strategy

properties.name: baseCurrency
properties.description: Primary operating currency ISO code (e.g., GBP, USD, EUR, AUD)

properties.name: supportedCurrencies
properties.description: Additional supported currencies for transactions and reporting (comma-separated ISO codes)

properties.name: taxJurisdictions
properties.description: Tax jurisdictions and regimes: UK-VAT, US-SalesTax, EU-VAT-OSS, AU-GST, etc.

properties.name: dataResidency
properties.description: Data residency requirements by region: UK-Only, EU-EEA, US-CONUS, Multi-Region, No-Restriction

properties.name: dateFormat
properties.description: Primary date format: DD/MM/YYYY (UK/EU), MM/DD/YYYY (US), YYYY-MM-DD (ISO)

properties.name: numberFormat
properties.description: Number formatting: comma-decimal (EU), period-decimal (UK/US), space-separator (FR)

properties.name: contentLocalization
properties.description: Content localization level: None, Translation-Only, Cultural-Adaptation, Full-Localization, Transcreation

properties.name: accessibilityStandard
properties.description: Accessibility compliance target: None, WCAG-2.1-A, WCAG-2.1-AA, WCAG-2.1-AAA, Section-508, EN-301-549

entities.name: ContextExtension
entities.description: Extensibility mechanism allowing users to define custom context type dimensions beyond the built-in types — each extension specifies a schema, validation rules, and integration points for user-defined classification criteria

properties.name: extensionId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this custom context extension

properties.name: extensionName
properties.description: Display name for the custom context dimension

properties.name: extensionSchema
properties.description: JSON Schema definition for the custom context type's properties and validation rules

properties.name: extensionCategory
properties.description: Category hint for grouping: Regulatory, Environmental, Social, Governance, Industry-Specific, Custom

properties.name: integrationPoints
properties.description: Which built-in context types this extension relates to (comma-separated entity names)

entities.name: ContextAssignment
entities.description: Junction entity linking a specific context type instance to an organisation, recording when and why the classification was assigned, its validity period, confidence score, and provenance for audit trail

properties.name: assignmentId
properties.description: Unique identifier for this context-to-organisation assignment

properties.name: assignedDate
properties.description: Date when this context type was assigned to the organisation

properties.name: validUntil
properties.description: Expiry date after which the assignment should be reviewed or renewed

properties.name: confidence
properties.description: Confidence score 0-100 for this classification assignment

properties.name: assignedBy
properties.description: User or system that made this context assignment

relationships.name: Market Extends Context Type
relationships.description: Links MarketClassification to the abstract ContextType base as an industry and market classification dimension

relationships.name: Size Extends Context Type
relationships.description: Links OrganisationSize to the abstract ContextType base as a multi-dimensional size classification dimension

relationships.name: Functional Maturity Extends Context Type
relationships.description: Links FunctionalMaturity to the abstract ContextType base as a per-function maturity assessment dimension

relationships.name: Tech Extends Context Type
relationships.description: Links TechnologyMaturity to the abstract ContextType base as a technology readiness dimension

relationships.name: Culture Extends Context Type
relationships.description: Links CultureContext to the abstract ContextType base as an organisational culture classification dimension

relationships.name: Geo Extends Context Type
relationships.description: Links GeoContext to the abstract ContextType base as a geographic location and market reach dimension

relationships.name: Positioning Extends Context Type
relationships.description: Links MarketPositioning to the abstract ContextType base as a competitive positioning dimension

relationships.name: Competitor Extends Context Type
relationships.description: Links CompetitorContext to the abstract ContextType base as a competitor bridge dimension

relationships.name: Extension Extends Context Type
relationships.description: Links a user-defined ContextExtension to the abstract ContextType base, enabling custom classification dimensions

relationships.name: Has Sub Segments
relationships.description: Links a MarketClassification to its constituent MarketSegments, enabling hierarchical sector-to-subsector-to-niche drill-down

relationships.name: Has IT Sub Maturity
relationships.description: Links general TechnologyMaturity to its ITMaturity sub-classification for infrastructure, DevOps, and security assessment

relationships.name: Has AI Readiness
relationships.description: Links TechnologyMaturity to the AIReadiness sub-assessment covering data readiness, AI talent, and model deployment

relationships.name: Assigns Context
relationships.description: Links a ContextAssignment junction record to the ContextType being assigned to an organisation

relationships.name: Size Influences Functional Maturity
relationships.description: Links OrganisationSize to FunctionalMaturity, reflecting how headcount, revenue, and customer base affect the sophistication of business functions

relationships.name: Culture Shapes Functional Maturity
relationships.description: Links CultureContext to FunctionalMaturity, reflecting how innovation orientation, risk tolerance, and learning culture constrain or accelerate function-level maturity

relationships.name: Geo Shapes Market
relationships.description: Links GeoContext to MarketClassification, reflecting how geographic presence and regulatory jurisdictions constrain or enable market access

relationships.name: Positioning In Market
relationships.description: Links MarketPositioning to a MarketClassification, capturing the organisation's competitive position within a specific market vertical

relationships.name: Competitor In Market
relationships.description: Links CompetitorContext to MarketClassification, identifying which market verticals a tracked competitor operates in

relationships.name: AI Requires IT Foundation
relationships.description: Links AIReadiness back to ITMaturity, reflecting that AI readiness depends on underlying IT infrastructure, DevOps, and data platform maturity

relationships.name: Size Determines Positioning
relationships.description: Links OrganisationSize to MarketPositioning, reflecting how headcount and revenue capacity constrain positioning strategy options

relationships.name: Segment Shaped By Geo
relationships.description: Links a MarketSegment back to GeoContext, reflecting that geographic reach and regulatory jurisdictions shape which segments are addressable

relationships.name: RCSG Extends Context Type
relationships.description: Links RCSGContext to the abstract ContextType base as a regulatory, compliance, security, and governance classification dimension

relationships.name: Localization Extends Context Type
relationships.description: Links LocalizationContext to the abstract ContextType base as a currency, tax, data residency, and content localization dimension

relationships.name: Localization Of Geo
relationships.description: Links LocalizationContext to GeoContext as a detailed localization extension of geographic presence — each operating region may require distinct currency, tax, and content localization

businessRules.name: Market Classification Requires Scheme
businessRules.action: THEN it MUST specify a classificationScheme (SIC, NAICS, GICS, ICB, ISIC, NACE, or Custom)

businessRules.name: Market Segment Requires Segmentation Type
businessRules.action: THEN segmentationType MUST be one of: geographic, demographic, behavioural, firmographic, psychographic, technographic

businessRules.name: AI Readiness Requires Data Readiness
businessRules.condition: IF an AIReadiness assessment has aiReadinessLevel above Exploring
businessRules.action: THEN dataReadiness MUST be at least Consolidated to support meaningful AI initiatives

businessRules.name: Context Assignment Must Be Current
businessRules.condition: IF a ContextAssignment has a validUntil date that has passed
businessRules.action: THEN the assignment MUST be reviewed and either renewed or archived

businessRules.name: Technology Maturity Requires Cloud Stage
businessRules.condition: IF a TechnologyMaturity assessment is created
businessRules.action: THEN cloudAdoptionStage MUST be specified to classify current cloud posture

businessRules.name: Organisation Size Alignment
businessRules.condition: IF OrganisationSize has sizeCategory of Micro or Small
businessRules.action: THEN linked FunctionalMaturity levels SHOULD NOT exceed 4 without explicit justification

businessRules.name: Functional Maturity Requires Function Name
businessRules.condition: IF a FunctionalMaturity assessment is created
businessRules.action: THEN functionName MUST be specified from the standard list or marked as Custom

businessRules.name: GeoContext Requires HQ Location
businessRules.action: THEN headquartersLocation MUST be specified as the primary operating base

businessRules.name: Competitor Context Should Have Recommendation
businessRules.condition: IF a CompetitorContext has threatLevel of High or Critical
businessRules.action: THEN recommendedResponse SHOULD be specified to guide strategic action

businessRules.name: Context Extension Requires Schema
businessRules.action: THEN extensionSchema MUST contain a valid JSON Schema definition for validation

businessRules.name: Localization Requires Base Currency
businessRules.action: THEN baseCurrency MUST be a valid ISO 4217 currency code for the primary operating jurisdiction
